on_screen_text: Good morning. I am going door-to-door to get your vote for mayor.
Hi, what can I do for you?
Nobody wants to be the next mayor.
frames.setting: Residential streets of Queens, NYC - suburban-style neighborhood with attached homes, front yards, gates, and stoops, exterior daytime
visual_elements: neighborhood location title cards with blue background and white text
South Asian woman speaking at doorstep
frames.presentation_style: documentary footage of campaign canvassing in Queens neighborhoods, location title cards identify the area and date

on_screen_text: So if you give me some time, let me explain.
They have never even looked at these neighborhoods for help, you know?
Okay, why this bus? Can't I walk?
Tell me more, what are you dreaming of?
frames.setting: Queens residential streets and stoops, conversations at doorways and on sidewalks
visual_elements: South Asian woman in colorful sari speaking to candidate
busy street corner with pedestrians and storefronts in background

on_screen_text: Are you bring home fully free metro?
